privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This policy explains the main categories of personal data processed on the Site Optimizer Core public website, checkout flow, delivery path, and support path.
privacy.lede: This policy explains the main categories of personal data processed on the Site Optimizer Core public website, checkout flow, delivery path, and support path.

trading as Electri_C_ity - Studios
Altensteiner Strasse 131
36448 Bad Liebenstein

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For privacy requests, support, licensing, billing, or technical questions, contact pierre.stephan1@electri-c-ity-studios.com.

sections.heading: Data we process
paragraphs: Website access data: server and security logs created when the public website is visited.
Checkout data: email address, licensed domain, order references, and related checkout records.
Portal and delivery data: license key, licensed domain, access checks, and support information provided by the customer.

sections.heading: Service partners and tools
paragraphs: Payment processing: payment approval and order capture are handled through PayPal.
Analytics and measurement: public pages load Google tag / measurement scripts.
Email communication: delivery and support communication may include order and license identifiers.

sections.heading: Why we process data
paragraphs: Data is processed to operate the website, create and complete checkouts, validate licensed access, deliver the current release, respond to support requests, and maintain service security and reporting.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on applicable law, you may have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and complaint. To exercise these rights, contact pierre.stephan1@electri-c-ity-studios.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service / License Terms
terms.description: These public terms describe the visible Guardian Core Monthly, Sovereign Enterprise Monthly and Sovereign Critical Monthly license plans and their exact licensed scope boundaries.
terms.lede: These public terms describe the visible Guardian Core Monthly, Sovereign Enterprise Monthly and Sovereign Critical Monthly license plans and their exact licensed scope boundaries.

sections.heading: Guardian Core Monthly
paragraphs: EUR 2,500.00 / month
Monthly optimization scope for one exact licensed domain.
Includes documentation, validation posture and protected access expectations.
Guardian Core Monthly is the clear entry point for one exact licensed domain. It is built for controlled SEO and performance optimization with validation and rollback.

sections.heading: Sovereign Enterprise Monthly
paragraphs: EUR 9,500.00 / month
Monthly multi-domain optimization for an exact licensed domain set confirmed during commercial review.
Includes documentation, validation posture and protected access expectations.
Sovereign Enterprise Monthly is designed for larger environments that need multi-domain optimization, audit evidence, validation and controlled activation.

sections.heading: Sovereign Critical Monthly
paragraphs: EUR 25,000.00 / month
Monthly high-compliance scope for an individually approved exact licensed domain set.
Includes documentation, validation posture and protected access expectations.
Sovereign Critical Monthly is the high-compliance model for especially sensitive or business-critical environments that require individual approval, strict validation and controlled activation.

sections.heading: Shared public offer boundaries
paragraphs: Not included under the public offer: open multi-domain rights beyond the exact licensed scope, custom implementation, migration, development services, or any rights beyond the public license scope unless separately agreed in writing.
Licensed download access remains protected and scope-bound. Public pages describe the offer, but they do not open private delivery, login, activation, or customer execution flows.
Access: current active release access while the license remains active
Support: email support for licensing, activation, download, billing, and technical issues

sections.heading: License and access
paragraphs: The exact licensed domain or the exact licensed domain set covered by the selected public plan is defined during checkout and later commercial review where required. Access and validation depend on an active license and correct domain validation.

sections.heading: Support, billing, and refunds
paragraphs: Support is available by email at pierre.stephan1@electri-c-ity-studios.com. Invoices are issued for completed orders. Refunds / withdrawal are handled according to applicable consumer law and the refund policy.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.description: This page summarizes the refund and withdrawal position for the public Site Optimizer Core offer.
refund.lede: This page summarizes the refund and withdrawal position for the public Site Optimizer Core offer.

sections.heading: EU consumer withdrawal right
paragraphs: Consumers in the EU have a 14-day right of withdrawal for eligible distance purchases.

sections.heading: Digital products and license delivery
paragraphs: For digital products and license deliveries, this right may expire once immediate performance begins if the customer expressly agrees and acknowledges it.

sections.heading: When refunds remain available
paragraphs: Refunds remain available where required by applicable consumer law.
